OverHistory.NewCommentry: Matt Henry to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Matt Henry bowling to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, short of good length ball, pitching on off stump, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi uncomfortably  plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 4 runs
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Matt Henry bowling to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, High in the air… and DROPPED by Kartik Sharma! short of good length ball, pitching on off stump, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stayed back and went for the pull but mistimed it badly off the splice. Kartik tracked back from mid?wicket, launched himself full length, got both hands to it — but couldn’t hold on. The ball trickled towards the mid?wicket fence. Kartik gave chase, tried to recover, but slipped again as he reached the rope, his boot making contact with the boundary cushions!

OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Matt Henry bowling to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Muscled over mid-wicket! good length ball, pitching on off stump, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi rocks back and pulls this over mid-wicket for a 76-meter maximum! He was dropped on the last ball, and he is straight away making CSK pay for it!

OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Noor Ahmad bowling to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, 50 OFF JUST 15 BALLS! WHAT AN INNINGS THIS IS! full length ball, pitching on middle stump, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stands deep, picks the length and muscles the loft, sending it sailing over long-on for a maximum! Gets to his fifty in just 15 balls!

That's the 3?rd joint-fastest half-century in #TATAIPL ????????

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Anshul Kamboj to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Anshul Kamboj bowling to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi plays an aggressive lofted cover drive on the front foot WICKET Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Sarfaraz Khan b Anshul Kamboj (Rajasthan Royals 75 Runs for 1 wickets) towards Deep Covers
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Anshul Kamboj bowling to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, STRIKED BUT TOO LATE! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi clears the front leg and goes hard, slapping it aerially toward deep extra cover. Sarfaraz sprints in from the boundary and dives full stretch, plucking it inches off the turf - what a sensational catch! Sooryavanshi stands frozen at the crease, disbelief written all over his face. The umpire has no doubts - it’s a clean catch, and the youngster must make his way back.
There’s a smile, though, as Sooryavanshi walks off, soaking in the applause. He lit up the contest with a whirlwind cameo, thrilling the crowd and almost dragging CSK out of trouble in what has been a tense, low scoring encounter

WICKET Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Sarfaraz Khan b Anshul Kamboj (Rajasthan Royals 75 Runs for 1 wicket)towards Deep Covers

Sharp work in the field! ?

Anshul Kamboj with an important breakthrough as Sarfaraz Khan takes a fine catch in the deep ????

— IndianPremierLeague (@IPL) March 30, 2026

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Anshul Kamboj to Dhruv Jurel Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Anshul Kamboj bowling to Dhruv Jurel, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Dhruv Jurel plays the scoop WICKET Dhruv Jurel b Anshul Kamboj (Rajasthan Royals 99 Runs for 2 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Anshul Kamboj bowling to Dhruv Jurel, FREE ONE! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Dhruv Jurel shuffles across to the off side, leaves his stumps exposed, and looks to get cheeky with a scoop over fine leg. He tries to show invention, but it’s a touch too fancy and completely unnecessary. He fails to get any bat on it, and the ball crashes straight into the leg stump! Jurel’s time in the middle is brief, but he’s given a glimpse of his potential. And that brings us to TIME OUT!

 WICKET Dhruv Jurel b Anshul Kamboj (Rajasthan Royals 99 Runs for 2 wickets)

OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Matthew Short bowling to Yashasvi Jaiswal, 16:16 in the Head-to-Head now as RR get two important points straight up! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Yashasvi Jaiswal works this to mid-wicket for a single to finish things off! RR start their campaign on a high with an emphatic eight-wicket win! 

Smiles all around the Royals camp! ????

A dominant chase completed in just 12.1 overs to seal a wonderful winning start in Guwahati ????
